close_reason: Positive observation: graceful skip on missing kubeconfig
description: secretx-k8s/tests/e2e.rs:30-33. Returns from the test (Ok) when the env var is absent, rather than panicking or being #[ignore]d. This means cargo test on a contributor's laptop without a kind cluster does not produce a red test, and CI without the env var simply runs the unit tests. The pattern is right; resist suggestions to gate it behind cfg(feature = ...) — env-var gating is more discoverable in test output.
title: E2E test gracefully skips when SECRETX_K8S_KUBECONFIG is unset
